creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Vladimir Melnik wrote:

Can you please tell us whether this is also the case with 6.3-RELEASE? 
Note that 6.2 is no longer supported, so in case you want to have us
helping you, it would be great to be able to reproduce this at least
on 6.3.

In case you can: please visit 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html 
so that you can see what information we need with kernel crashes so that 
we can properly help you and sort out the problem.

Thanks for using FreeBSD and taking the time to get the product better! 
It's appreciated!

Cheers
remko
